nasb.text: “Thus says the Lord, ‘Just so will I destroy the pride of Judah and the great pride of Jerusalem.

esv.text: “Thus says the Lord: Even so will I spoil the pride of Judah and the great pride of Jerusalem.

cnv.text: “耶和華這樣說：‘我必照樣敗壞猶大的尊榮和耶路撒冷極大的尊榮。

ccb.text: “这是耶和华说的，‘我也要这样消灭犹大的骄傲和耶路撒冷的狂妄。
